title: MIA Premises: What MHRA Inspectors Expect
alt: Checklist of MIA premises and facility requirements for an MHRA inspection

items.label: Justified GMP design
items.desc: Premises suit declared activities, justified via ICH Q9 risk management

items.label: Flow & segregation
items.desc: One-directional flow with airlocks, gowning and dedicated areas

items.label: Cross-contamination control
items.desc: Dedicated facilities or HBEL-based toxicological evaluation

items.label: Annex 1 for sterile
items.desc: Contamination Control Strategy, A-D grades, RABS or isolators

items.label: Qualified utilities & data
items.desc: Water, HVAC and gases qualified; records meet ALCOA+

items.label: Maintenance & qualification
items.desc: PM, pest control, access control plus URS, DQ, IQ/OQ/PQ
